title: ForceItemPlugin
description: A force item battle plugin (inspired by BastiGHG)
body:
# Force Item Plugin

> inspired by: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=zTzb1V17e90

With this plugin, all players are trying to get specific items as fast as possible, whichever team gets the most items wins.

## How to play

### 1. Create teams

- use `/team create <Name> <color>` to create the teams and give them colors
- you can add players to teams using `/team add <team> <player>`

### 2. Start

- use `/start HH:MM:SS` to start the timer
- you can later do e.g. `/timer add 10m` to add more time
- teams can skip items using `/skip` *(each team has 3 skips)*
- every team has a shared backpack that can be opened using `/bp`

### 3. Results

- with `/reveal` you can reveal the results: It will start with the last team, and then for each team you execute `/reveal` again, to see the next higher teams result

**Note:** For a better experience please install the [AXHud Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/axhud)

## Permissions

- `/start`: OP or forceitem.start
- `/team`: OP or forceitem.team
- `/skip`: everyone
- `/reveal`: OP or forceitem.reveal
- `/timer`: OP or forceitem.timer
- `/bp`: everyone
